query:
INSERT INTO roles (name, icon, color, domain, persona, description, sortOrder) VALUES
('Banker', '🏦', '#60A5FA', 'Finance', 'FUND_MANAGER', 'KYC/AML, credit risk, loan structuring, portfolio monitoring', 1),
('Compliance Officer', '📋', '#F59E0B', 'Legal', 'LAWYER', 'Regulatory compliance, audit trails, policy review, risk assessment', 2),
('Doctor', '🩺', '#22D3EE', 'Healthcare', 'DOCTOR', 'Clinical summaries, drug interactions, ICD coding, patient records', 3),
('Enterprise Manager', '🏢', '#E879F9', 'Enterprise', 'ENTERPRISE', 'HR, procurement, SLA management, workflow automation', 4),
('Financial Analyst', '📈', '#4ADE80', 'Finance', 'FUND_MANAGER', 'Deal screening, DCF models, comps, macro monitoring', 5),
('Fund Manager', '💼', '#34D399', 'Finance', 'FUND_MANAGER', 'Portfolio construction, fund performance, asset allocation, rebalancing', 6),
('Healthcare Admin', '🏥', '#67E8F9', 'Healthcare', 'DOCTOR', 'Patient flow, bed management, staffing, scheduling, billing', 7),
('Investor', '💎', '#C9A84C', 'GCC Wealth', 'INVESTMENT_MANAGER', 'Private wealth, HNWI profiling, Shariah compliance, family office', 8),
('Lawyer', '⚖️', '#94A3B8', 'Legal', 'LAWYER', 'Contract review, clause extraction, GCC compliance, risk scoring', 9),
('Manager', '🎯', '#F87171', 'Enterprise', 'ENTERPRISE', 'KPI tracking, budget analysis, project monitoring, meeting summaries', 10),
('Marketing Manager', '📣', '#FB923C', 'Enterprise', 'ENTERPRISE', 'Campaign analysis, brand strategy, market research, content planning', 11),
('Retailer', '🛍️', '#A78BFA', 'Enterprise', 'ENTERPRISE', 'Inventory management, pricing strategy, customer analytics, sales forecasting', 12),
('Student', '🎓', '#818CF8', 'Education', 'STUDENT', 'Research assistance, citations, essay outlining, study planning', 13),
('Wealth Advisor', '🌟', '#FCD34D', 'GCC Wealth', 'INVESTMENT_MANAGER', 'GCC wealth planning, Shariah-compliant products, estate planning, HNWI advisory', 14)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
